title: Astrolepis beitelii

intro: Astrolepis beitelii, also known as Beitel's lipfern, is a species of fern in the family Lomariopsidaceae, characterized by its unique, lacy fronds. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health issues, including arthritis, digestive problems, and respiratory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Bioactive constituents of Astrolepis beitelii include flavonoids, saponins, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
